case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. KENNETT MALABANAN

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002171), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED OCT-07-2019, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE OCT-24-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT MALABANAN, KENNETT
DECLARATION OF DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 210032701) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALABANAN, KENNETT $10,493.73 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,663.73, SEE SCANNED DOC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210032701), $2,233.49 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT MALABANAN, KENNETT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MALABANAN, KENNETT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002352) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MALABANAN, KENNETT
